overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character riding a Sunwing flying machine through a lush tropical jungle with ancient ruins, navigating around a massive overgrown tower, and descending to skim over coastal beaches and ocean waves. The scene features vibrant post-apocalyptic nature reclaiming ancient structures under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical jungle canopy with distant ruins

events.description: banking left to reveal coastal beach in the distance
approaching tall ancient tower structure emerging from jungle canopy

agents.ego_description: piloting a Sunwing flying mount at high speed above the jungle canopy, banking toward ancient ruins

entered.detail: lush green tropical tree canopy covering the ground below
tall overgrown stone and metal tower structure in the distance
sandy beach and turquoise water visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Flying high above dense tropical jungle canopy under bright midday sun, with ancient ruined towers visible in the distance. The camera banks left revealing a coastal beach below, then approaches a massive overgrown tower structure while maintaining altitude above the treetops.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty air around ancient tower ruins

events.description: entering misty fog layer surrounding the tower structure
circling around the tower while maintaining close proximity

agents.ego_description: navigating the Sunwing around the massive ancient tower, flying through patches of mist and clouds while banking around the structure

entered.detail: atmospheric fog and clouds surrounding the tower at mid-level altitude

segments.scene_description: Circling a massive ancient tower covered in vegetation, flying through patches of mist and clouds that partially obscure the sky. The jungle canopy falls away below as the camera navigates closely around the stone and metal structure, with sunlight creating lens flare effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach and shallow coastal waters

events.description: beginning descent from tower altitude toward beach level
transitioning from beach sand to shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: descending rapidly from the tower altitude toward the coastal beach, skimming over palm trees and sandy shore before reaching the water

entered.detail: pristine sandy beach with palm trees along the shoreline
clear turquoise coastal water with visible sand beneath

segments.scene_description: Descending from the tower toward a pristine tropical beach with turquoise water. The camera flies low over the sand and shallow coastal waters, transitioning from the jungle environment to the coastal marine setting while maintaining high speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean with waves and distant islands

events.description: flying extremely low with wings nearly touching wave crests
entering misty horizon area over open ocean

agents.ego_description: skimming at extremely low altitude over ocean waves, following the coastline toward distant rocky formations with water splashing below

entered.detail: dynamic ocean waves with white foam crests
rocky outcrops and cliffs along the coastline

segments.scene_description: Flying at extremely low altitude over ocean waves, with the Sunwing's wings nearly touching the water surface. The scene shows open sea with distant rocky islands and a misty horizon, maintaining high speed over the deep blue water with waves rolling below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins high above a tropical wilderness and culminates in a close-range orbit of a colossal ancient ruin. It begins by gliding over a dense jungle canopy under a bright midday sun, with the camera banking left to reveal a distant coastal beach. As the flight continues, the perspective shifts toward a massive overgrown tower, maintaining altitude above the treetops while approaching the structure. The scene then transitions into a tight circle around the vegetation-covered stone and metal of the tower, weaving through patches of mist and clouds that partially obscure the sky. Finally, the jungle canopy falls away below as the camera navigates the ruins, with intense sunlight creating vivid lens flare effects.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed descent from a towering jungle structure toward the open expanse of a tropical ocean. It begins by diving away from the ruins and gliding low over a pristine beach where the lush greenery gives way to white sand and turquoise shallows. As the camera maintains its momentum, the coastal shoreline recedes and the environment shifts into a vast marine setting. The scene then opens up to the deep blue of the open sea, with the Sunwing skimming at an extremely low altitude so that its wings nearly touch the rolling waves. Finally, the flight continues toward a misty horizon dotted with distant rocky islands under the bright sunlight.
